TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Taimali, title = Taimali, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taimali} }

S.FORM: Taimali mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 102.29 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 4.53 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 57.38 km²), 7,128 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,979 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,782 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 67%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan, Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Taimali ays psgayun 9 ru 13 alang. 13 alang hani ga, Lupakatj , Tjavualji , Kiring , Tjatjigel , Anasolay , Davugele , Takidis , Padrangigrang , Calavi , Kanadun , Sasaljak , Lalauran , Cilalongay .

Taimali mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 102.29 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 4.53 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 57.38 km²), 7,128 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,979 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,782 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 67%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan, Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Taimali ays psgayun 9 ru 13 alang. 13 alang hani ga, Lupakatj , Tjavualji , Kiring , Tjatjigel , Anasolay , Davugele , Takidis , Padrangigrang , Calavi , Kanadun , Sasaljak , Lalauran , Cilalongay .
S.PHON: taimali mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pajwan, amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu taimali ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, lupakatj , tja*ualji , kiriŋ , tjatjiɣel , anas~ɕolaj , *a*uɣele , taki*is~ɕ , pa*raŋiɣraŋ , ʦ~ʨala*i , kana*un , s~ɕas~ɕaljak , lalauran , ʦ~ʨilaloŋaj .
